case_title: MAX WEINTRAUB VS. SOMMANG CHAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO FULL POLICY LIMITS (TRANSACTION ID # 65894456)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-26-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEINTRAUB, MAX AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SOMMANG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-15-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-22-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
